src/decision-graph-records.d.ts.reason: Typed decision graph record contracts are intentionally grouped so graph consumers get one stable data surface.

src/decision-graph-records.js.reason: Typed decision graph record constructors are intentionally grouped with their shared normalization helpers.

src/js-ts-declarations.js.reason: Dependency-free JS/TS declaration scanner keeps tokenization and merge classification in one parser unit.

src/js-ts-merge-contracts.d.ts.reason: JS/TS merge contract records are intentionally grouped as one public contract surface.

src/js-ts-merge-contracts.js.reason: JS/TS merge contract constructors are intentionally grouped with their shared conflict-key helpers.

src/semantic-merge-admission.js.reason: Semantic merge admission coordinates contract, sidecar, and conflict classification in one admission unit.

src/source-roundtrip.js.reason: No-op source roundtrip scanner keeps lexical scanning, reconstruction, and feature summarization together.

src/source-trivia-ledger.js.reason: Source span/trivia ledger keeps source scanning and deterministic conflict-key generation together.
